description.en: 💌A tiny (995KB) but mighty timer in **pure C** ! — almost no memory usage!❤️‍🔥 Supports clock, countdown, stopwatch, Pomodoro, and fully customizable tray animations (GIFs, CPU/Mem%) 💘 Don't be shy, join here🧸: https://discord.com/invite/W3tW2gtp6g
